title: DROP-IN CENTER AND CONFERENCE ROOM - 211info
text: SOCC DROP-IN CENTER AND CONFERENCE ROOM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a drop-in center for individuals experiencing mental health or addiction challenges. Offers a safe space to talk about trauma, anxiety, emotions, and other personal topics while supporting recovery. Daily activities include yoga, art, walking, games, internet access, and socializing. Monthly group outings are also available. 280 NE Santiam Boulevard Mill City, OR 97360 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 12am-5pm Email (503) 392-4276 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 392-4276 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Linn, Marion, and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 10am-5pm Services: Mental Health Drop In Centers Public Internet Access Sites Substance Use Disorder Drop In Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: MUTUAL SUPPORT - PEER SUPPORT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SOCC
